message:
test: expand test coverage for Google Discovery schema normalization,
mesh admission errors, SDK streaming, and store source diversity

Add comprehensive edge-case and feature-coverage tests across four
infrastructure crates.

crates/fcp-google-discovery/src/lib.rs (+1294 lines):
- Schema normalization tests: required field deduplication and sorting,
  enum value deduplication and sorting, additional_properties handling,
  nested object/array schema normalization, property ordering, ref
  resolution, and canonical JSON schema output
- Tests exercise edge cases: empty schemas, deeply nested objects,
  circular reference detection, duplicate property names

crates/fcp-mesh/src/admission.rs (+685 lines):
- AdmissionError display coverage: verify human-readable error messages
  for all variants (ByteBudget, SymbolBudget, AuthFailure, Decode,
  Amplification, SessionExpired, etc.)
- Error code uniqueness validation: assert all error variant codes are
  distinct
- Admission policy tests: budget enforcement, auth verification,
  session lifecycle validation

crates/fcp-sdk/tests/no_mock_integration.rs:
- New streaming_thread_info_survives_sdk_to_client_flow() test:
  verifies ThreadInfo metadata (thread_id, kind, parent_id) propagates
  correctly through the SDK event streaming pipeline without loss

crates/fcp-store/tests/no_mock_integration.rs:
- Extract SourceDiversityLogEntry struct for structured test output
- Improve test logging organization and readability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -123,36 +123,39 @@ fn test_symbol_with_source(n: u8, esi: u32, source_node: u64) -> StoredSymbol {
     }
 }
 
-fn emit_source_diversity_log(
-    test_name: &str,
-    zone_id: &ZoneId,
+struct SourceDiversityLogEntry<'a> {
+    test_name: &'a str,
+    zone_id: &'a ZoneId,
     object_id: ObjectId,
     distinct_sources_observed: usize,
     max_concentration_bps_observed: u16,
     min_distinct_sources_required: u8,
     max_concentration_bps_required: u16,
-    repair_actions: &[RepairReasonCode],
-    result: &str,
-) {
-    let repair_actions = repair_actions
+    repair_actions: &'a [RepairReasonCode],
+    result: &'a str,
+}
+
+fn emit_source_diversity_log(entry: &SourceDiversityLogEntry<'_>) {
+    let repair_actions = entry
+        .repair_actions
         .iter()
         .map(ToString::to_string)
         .collect::<Vec<_>>();
     println!(
         "{}",
         serde_json::json!({
-            "test_name": test_name,
+            "test_name": entry.test_name,
             "module": "fcp-store-no-mock",
             "phase": "integration",
             "operation": "source_diversity",
-            "zone_id": zone_id.to_string(),
-            "object_id": object_id.to_string(),
-            "distinct_sources_observed": distinct_sources_observed,
-            "max_concentration_bps_observed": max_concentration_bps_observed,
-            "min_distinct_sources_required": min_distinct_sources_required,
-            "max_concentration_bps_required": max_concentration_bps_required,
+            "zone_id": entry.zone_id.to_string(),
+            "object_id": entry.object_id.to_string(),
+            "distinct_sources_observed": entry.distinct_sources_observed,
+            "max_concentration_bps_observed": entry.max_concentration_bps_observed,
+            "min_distinct_sources_required": entry.min_distinct_sources_required,
+            "max_concentration_bps_required": entry.max_concentration_bps_required,
             "repair_actions": repair_actions,
-            "result": result,
+            "result": entry.result,
         })
     );
 }

 }
